text.title: Benefit Sustainment Checklist Decision Tree
text.summary: Routes the BA from artefact-state signal to the active rule.

decision-tree.root-question: metrics list non-empty AND each metric has target+measured?

conclusion.verdict: fill target+measured per metric before signoff

text.example: All required fields populated → named owner ≥2 tokens → version_tag semver → publish (r4).
